title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A discussion of warning signs in the AI boom including overspending on token consumption, inefficient allocation with only 18% of tokens spent on shipped products, and circular investment dynamics. The episode also covers Anthropic's rise in valuation, AI trading applications via Robinhood, and privacy concerns with AI services.
